sentences.target: On parle du respect en classe.

translations.fr: On parle du respect en classe.
translations.en: We talk about respect in class.
translations.es: Hablamos sobre el respeto en clase.
translations.de: Wir sprechen im Unterricht über Respekt.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在课堂上讨论尊重。
translations.yue: 我哋喺課堂上討論尊重。
translations.ru: Мы говорим об уважении на уроке.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nói về sự tôn trọng trong lớp.
translations.nl: We praten in de klas over respect.
translations.uk: Ми говоримо про повагу на уроці.
translations.hi: हम कक्षा में सम्मान के बारे में बात करते हैं।
translations.el: Μιλάμε για τον σεβασμό στην τάξη.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om respekt i timen.
translations.id: Kami berbicara tentang rasa hormat di kelas.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om respekt på lektionen.
translations.da: Vi taler om respekt i timen.
translations.ja: 授業で敬意について話します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; generic we/one; triggers 3rd person singular verb.
Main verb, present indicative (3sg); selects the preposition de to introduce the topic.
Contraction of preposition de + definite article le; here marks the complement/topic after parler de (“about the”).
Common masculine noun; complement of du (de); denotes the topic being discussed.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Common feminine noun; object of en, indicating the setting.

sentences.target: Je demande juste du respect au travail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dəmɑ̃d ʒyst dy ʁɛspɛ o tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Je demande juste du respect au travail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dəmɑ̃d ʒyst dy ʁɛspɛ o tʁavaj/
translations.en: I’m just asking for respect at work.
translations.es: Solo pido respeto en el trabajo.
translations.de: Ich bitte nur um Respekt am Arbeitsplatz.
translations.zh-Hans: 我只是在工作中要求尊重。
translations.yue: 我喺工作度只係要求尊重。
translations.ru: Я лишь прошу уважения на работе.
translations.pt: Eu só peço respeito no trabalho.
translations.vi: Tôi chỉ yêu cầu sự tôn trọng ở nơi làm việc.
translations.ar: أنا فقط أطلب الاحترام في العمل.
translations.nl: Ik vraag alleen om respect op het werk.
translations.uk: Я лише прошу поваги на роботі.
translations.hi: मैं बस काम पर सम्मान की मांग करता हूँ।
translations.pl: Proszę tylko o szacunek w pracy.
translations.nb: Jeg ber bare om respekt på jobben.
translations.id: Saya hanya meminta rasa hormat di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Jag ber bara om respekt på jobbet.
translations.cs: V práci žádám jen o respekt.
translations.da: Jeg beder bare om respekt på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場でただ敬意を求めています。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun; marks the speaker.
Main verb, present indicative (1sg); transitive, takes a direct object.
Adverb meaning “only/just”; scope restrictor modifying the verb phrase.
Partitive determiner indicating a nonspecific amount.
Common masculine noun; direct object of demande.
Contraction of preposition à + definite article le; introduces a locative complement.
Common masculine noun; object of au, indicating workplace context.

sentences.target: Tu montres du respect envers ta sœur.
sentences.reading: /ty mɔ̃tʁ dy ʁɛspɛ ɑ̃vɛʁ ta sœʁ/

translations.fr: Tu montres du respect envers ta sœur.
translations.ipa: /ty mɔ̃tʁ dy ʁɛspɛ ɑ̃vɛʁ ta sœʁ/
translations.en: You show respect to your sister.
translations.zh-Hans: 你对你姐姐表现出尊重。
translations.yue: 你對你家姐表現出尊重。
translations.ru: Ты проявляешь уважение к своей сестре.
translations.pt: Você demonstra respeito pela sua irmã.
translations.vi: Bạn thể hiện sự tôn trọng với chị gái của mình.
translations.nl: Je toont respect voor je zus.
translations.uk: Ти виявляєш повагу до своєї сестри.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी बहन के प्रति सम्मान दिखाते हो।
translations.el: Δείχνεις σεβασμό προς την αδελφή σου.
translations.nb: Du viser respekt for søsteren din.
translations.id: Kamu menunjukkan rasa hormat kepada kakak perempuanmu.
translations.sv: Du visar respekt för din syster.
translations.ro: Arăți respect față de sora ta.
translations.da: Du viser respekt for din søster.
translations.ja: あなたは姉に敬意を示します。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative (2sg); transitive.
Partitive determiner indicating an indefinite quantity.
Common masculine noun; direct object of montres.
Preposition meaning “towards”; introduces the target/recipient of the action.
Possessive determiner (2sg), feminine singular; agrees with sœur.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition envers.

sentences.target: Le respect compte beaucoup entre voisins.

translations.fr: Le respect compte beaucoup entre voisins.
translations.en: Respect matters a lot between neighbors.
translations.es: El respeto importa mucho entre vecinos.
translations.de: Respekt ist unter Nachbarn sehr wichtig.
translations.it: Il rispetto conta molto tra i vicini.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居之间的尊重非常重要。
translations.yue: 鄰里之間的尊重好重要。
translations.pt: O respeito é muito importante entre vizinhos.
translations.vi: Sự tôn trọng giữa hàng xóm rất quan trọng.
translations.nl: Respect is erg belangrijk tussen buren.
translations.hu: A szomszédok között nagyon fontos a tisztelet.
translations.hi: पड़ोसियों के बीच सम्मान बहुत मायने रखता है।
translations.pl: Szacunek między sąsiadami jest bardzo ważny.
translations.el: Ο σεβασμός έχει μεγάλη σημασία ανάμεσα στους γείτονες.
translations.id: Rasa hormat antar tetangga sangat penting.
translations.sv: Respekt är mycket viktigt mellan grannar.
translations.cs: Respekt mezi sousedy je velmi důležitý.
translations.fi: Kunnioitus on naapureiden kesken hyvin tärkeää.
translations.ja: 近所同士の敬意はとても大切です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a generic noun.
Common masculine noun; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative (3sg); means “counts/matters.”
Degree adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing a relational/locative complement.
Common plural noun; object of entre; denotes the group among which the relation holds.

Tu montres du respect envers ta sœur.
Le respect compte beaucoup entre voisins.

I’m just asking for respect at work.
